text:
Dear Sirs,

Our company supports FreeBSD solutions, therefore I wish to ask how we may be listed as a vendor on your good website?
I would appreciate your help and all information

Thanks in advance for help
Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

With very best regards
Wojciech Kowalczyk
Shipmedics Ltd.
Szczecin\Poland

WWW.SHIPMEDICS.COM
